questions.text: Fill in the Blank: All items purchased externally in Direct scope have a contract number, PR and ____
Analysis of ________ should allow to perform day to day activities of purchasing/planning teams, cover the needs of follow up and analysis of the team and internal controls requirements.
Analysis of Procurement data will be performed in S4 or in ____ depending on the needs
True or False: With NEO’s new ways of working, we are now dependent from the purchasing team to access reports.

Which of the following will be the expected benefits of NEO:
Direct access to reports needed allowing to gain time and have a better view of the activity
Gain efficiency: to make specific analyses on suppliers, contracts, products in Fiori report, GCP
Optimize the procurement spend
All the above
